name: Unexpected High School Reunion
description:
You have an unexpected encounter with some old classmates in a bar. Taichi Akibana and Marissa Clairmont, who used to be popular kids back at your old high school are there drinking together. Unfortunately, due to personal reasons, you had to drop out of school before graduation, and the two of them apparently think that’s hilarious. It’s been 10 years, how much have you changed and grown? Oh also, you might just run into another old friend as well…

Tried to make a somewhat open ended scenario and left some specific details up for the user to decide.
creator: Scxxxmia
